title: Kristi Noem's $220m vanity ads cost more than Hollywood blockbusters
author: Rob Beschizza
summary: People Magazine compares the $220m budget for a few vanity shots of fired Homeland Security chief Kristi Noem to the budgets of this year's Oscar-nominated films. It turns out the no-bid contract dwarfs the budgets of all but one. In fact, it's more money that almost all Hollywood movies burn through on their way to the silver screen, including spectacular bl
